title: Jlf9Xn3Bwtdu797Wjl6V4Xmar7I8Al
summary:
Main
By Chara Georgousi
The turbulent dynamics witnessed in oil markets during the five months of 2024 have had a direct impact on crude freight demand fundamentals. Volatile crude prices, coupled with fluctuating supply and shifting trade flow patterns, dictate the volume of shipments and corresponding tonne-mile requirements for crude tanker operators. As we head into the second half of the year, several key factors are emerging that will influence the trajectory of tanker demand through the remainder of 2024.
